audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds. All production code paths apply bit-reversal before inverse FFT for Lagrange-to-monomial conversion: (1) poly_lagrange_to_monomial enforces sequence at L69-74, (2) eip7594.c:711 bit-reverses at L701 before fr_ifft, (3) recovery.c:304 operates on cells_brp pre-reversed at L243. Test code (tests.c:1715) tests raw FFT/IFFT identity without bit-reversal, which is mathematically correct for coefficient-form round-trip but distinct from Lagrange conversion.
